product_overview: SkillBridge is an AI-powered web app that generates structured learning roadmaps, presents them on an interactive visual canvas, provides an AI tutor and quizzes per topic, and tracks learner progress and profile metrics.
core_goals: Generate practical, step-by-step learning roadmaps from natural language goals.
Provide an interactive visual workspace for following roadmaps, inspecting node details, taking quizzes, and chatting with an AI tutor.
Persist projects and roadmaps with sharing/export capabilities and surface progress, XP, streaks, and badges in the user profile.
Offer basic account management (registration, login, password reset, settings, language preference) with strong UX and error handling.

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account with name, email, and password to access protected app features.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password input field -> Submit registration form -> See success toast and be redirected to /app

Navigate to /register -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field with existing account -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password input field -> Submit registration form -> See error toast indicating email already in use

features.name: User Login (Email & OAuth)
features.description: Authenticate existing users via email/password or OAuth providers and access the app workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> Redirect to /app on success
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with wrong credentials -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /login -> Initiate OAuth provider flow (Google/GitHub) -> Complete provider consent -> Be redirected to /auth/callback -> Redirect to /app on successful OAuth
Navigate to /login -> Initiate OAuth provider flow -> Provider denies consent or callback contains error -> Be redirected to /auth/callback -> See OAuth error message

features.name: Password Reset
features.description: Request a password reset email and set a new password using a tokenized link.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field -> Submit password reset request -> Receive reset email -> Navigate to /reset-password/:token from email -> Fill new password -> Submit new password -> See success toast and be redirected to /login
Navigate to /reset-password/:token with an invalid or expired token -> Fill new password -> Submit new password -> See error message indicating invalid or expired token

features.name: AI Chat
features.description: Interact with an AI assistant for guidance, explanations, and to generate content with streaming responses and basic controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Focus AI chat input -> Type a message in chat input -> Press Send button or Enter key -> See real-time streaming AI response
Navigate to /app -> Type a message in chat input -> Press Send button or Enter key -> Click Stop button during streaming -> Observe streaming stops and partial response remains
Navigate to /app -> Type a message in chat input -> Press Send button or Enter key -> API error or rate limit occurs -> See error toast and no AI response

features.name: Roadmap Generation
features.description: Generate a structured learning roadmap from a natural language topic and render it on the interactive canvas tied to a project.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Focus AI chat input -> Type a topic in chat (e.g. "buat roadmap belajar React") -> Press Send button or Enter key -> AI generates roadmap and displays it on canvas -> Observe roadmap nodes rendered and persisted to the project
Navigate to /app -> Focus AI chat input -> Type a request outside allowed technology domains -> Press Send button or Enter key -> See rejection or constraint message explaining domain restriction
Navigate to /app -> Focus AI chat input -> Type a topic in chat -> Press Send button or Enter key -> Generation service fails -> See error toast and option to retry

features.name: Node Detail Experience
features.description: Inspect a roadmap node to view resources, consult the AI tutor in node context, and create or edit notes persisted per user and node.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Select a roadmap node on the canvas -> Node detail panel opens showing Resources, AI Tutor, and Notes -> View a resource card and open the resource -> Add a note in Notes and save -> Observe note persisted for the node
Navigate to /app -> Select a roadmap node with unmet prerequisites -> Attempt node-locked action (e.g., start quiz) -> See locked state and message explaining prerequisites

features.name: Quiz
features.description: Take multiple-choice quizzes for roadmap topics to assess mastery and update progress and XP.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Select a roadmap node -> Start quiz for the selected node -> Answer multiple choice questions within the timer -> Submit quiz -> See results with score percentage and pass/fail based on 80% threshold
Navigate to /app -> Select a roadmap node -> Start quiz -> Let the 5-minute timer expire -> Quiz auto-submits -> See timeout handling and partial score with feedback

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View personal progress metrics (XP, level, streaks, learning minutes), review projects, and edit basic profile information.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View profile stats (XP, level, streak, projects) -> Edit name and bio -> Save profile changes -> See success toast and updated profile information
Navigate to /profile -> Edit name to an invalid value (e.g., empty) -> Attempt to save changes -> See validation error and unchanged profile data

features.name: Settings
features.description: Adjust account preferences such as appearance and manage account actions exposed in the UI.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Toggle dark/light theme -> Observe immediate UI theme update and preference persisted

Navigate to /settings -> Click Delete Account and confirm deletion -> Receive confirmation of deletion or observe account removed in UI (note: backend deletion may be unavailable in beta) -> If backend deletion fails, see an error message explaining incomplete implementation

features.name: Language Selection
features.description: Choose the application language preference between English and Indonesian and persist the selection.
user_flows: Navigate to /language -> Select English or Indonesian -> UI updates to the selected language and preference is persisted
Navigate to /language -> Select a language -> Persistence request fails -> UI updates locally but shows an error toast indicating preference could not be saved

features.name: Share Roadmap (Public View)
features.description: Provide a read-only public view of a roadmap via a shareable URL for consumption without authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /share/:roadmapId -> Public shared roadmap loads in read-only mode -> Browse nodes and view resource details without edit capabilities
Navigate to /share/:roadmapId with an invalid or non-public roadmapId -> See not found or access denied message

routes.description: Landing page with hero, features, pricing. Redirects to /app if authenticated
Reset password with token from email
Main app with roadmap canvas, sidebar, and AI chat
User profile with stats, projects, badges

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register with name, email and password

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: AI Chat
features.description: Chat with AI assistant about learning topics with real-time streaming
user_interactions: Type a message in chat input
Press Send button or Enter key
Click Stop button to cancel streaming
Click copy button on code blocks

features.name: Roadmap Generation
features.description: Generate learning roadmaps on any topic using AI
user_interactions: Type a topic in chat (e.g. "buat roadmap belajar React")
AI generates roadmap and displays it on canvas
Click on roadmap nodes to see details

features.name: Quiz
features.description: Take quizzes on roadmap topics to test knowledge
user_interactions: Click Take Quiz button on a roadmap node
Pass or fail based on 90 percent threshold

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and edit user profile with stats and achievements
user_interactions: View profile stats (XP, level, streak, projects)

features.name: Settings
features.description: Manage account settings including theme and account deletion

features.name: Language Selection
features.description: Choose between English and Indonesian language

known_limitations.issue: Billing page is a UI stub without payment integration
known_limitations.impact: Display only, no actual payment processing
